brief: Geopolitical tensions rise as Dubai bypasses Strait of Hormuz with new port deal and Trump threatens Iran's infrastructure, while Ukraine's military shakeup continues. In research, studies explore AI for dementia care, visual query tools, and AI-assisted information evaluation.
news_summary: Dubai announces a port bypassing Hormuz; Trump threatens Iran's bridges and power plants; Paramount-Warner merger advances; Ukraine's military command changes; Laredo's tariff-driven boom faces risks; Israeli banks threaten Palestinian economy.
papers_summary: Papers examine ethical perspectives on generative AI for dementia care, a visual query tracer for logic programming, and rhetorical patterns for AI-assisted information evaluation, among other HCI topics.

en.brief: Geopolitical tensions rise as Dubai bypasses Strait of Hormuz with new port deal and Trump threatens Iran's infrastructure, while Ukraine's military shakeup continues. In research, studies explore AI for dementia care, visual query tools, and AI-assisted information evaluation.
en.news_summary: Dubai announces a port bypassing Hormuz; Trump threatens Iran's bridges and power plants; Paramount-Warner merger advances; Ukraine's military command changes; Laredo's tariff-driven boom faces risks; Israeli banks threaten Palestinian economy.
en.papers_summary: Papers examine ethical perspectives on generative AI for dementia care, a visual query tracer for logic programming, and rhetorical patterns for AI-assisted information evaluation, among other HCI topics.

zh.brief: 今日重點包括日本短褲政策引發性別爭議、金門翔安機場的情感工程、以及烏克蘭軍方高層更迭。研究方面聚焦生成式AI於失智照護、互動式邏輯程式視覺化等主題。
zh.news_summary: 日本鼓勵男性穿短褲辦公，女性不滿「腿毛騷擾」；金門居民對廈門翔安機場的「情感工程」看法分歧；烏克蘭總統澤連斯基在抗議聲中革除軍方總司令。
zh.papers_summary: 研究涵蓋生成式AI促進失智症社交連結、互動式邏輯程式視覺化工具、以及高斯潑濺體素渲染等主題。

todays_image.caption: The hawthorn's thorns and dense growth, which demand careful navigation, echo the strategic need for a new port to bypass the Strait of Hormuz.
todays_image.title: Crataegus pruinosa (H.L. Wendl.) K. Koch
